caption:
China's BrainCo has presented a new brain-to-robot artificial intelligence system that enables users to operate robots with their thoughts. 

The technology employs an EEG headset to detect brain signals, which are then processed by AI into robot commands in under 200 milliseconds. This system is compatible with humanoid robots, robotic arms, and robot dogs. During a demonstration, tasks such as picking up a cup and an apple were performed successfully.

In addition, BrainCo has launched a data collection platform designed to link human actions, brain activity, and robotic responses. This initiative aims to enhance the development and training of embodied AI systems.
